name: ListBalanceTransactions
description: List all transactions for a specific balance. Shows the transaction history including transaction type, amounts (initial and result), deductions (fees), and timestamps. Useful for auditing, reconciliation, and understanding balance changes over time. Transactions represent movements in and out of the balance.

balance_id.description: The ID of the balance to list transactions for (e.g., 'bal_abc123').

limit.description: Optional number of transactions to return per page (default 50, maximum 250).

testmode.description: Enable test mode. Set to 'true' to retrieve test mode transactions, or omit for live mode.
